name: New Note File Scaffold Check
description: When a new HTML file is created in notes/, checks it has the correct Residency Journal scaffold

then.prompt:
A new note HTML file was just created. Before any content is added, verify it has the correct Residency Journal scaffold from STYLE_GUIDE.md:
- Page size: height:297mm (not min-height), A4 fixed
- Background: #f7f3ec with ruled lines
- Fonts: EB Garamond (headings), Overpass (body), Overpass Mono (badges/footer)
- Tab strip with 4 tabs: Foundations / Presentation / Management / MCQ
- Page header with burgundy bar (#2b1810)
- Body as flex column with flex:1
- Footer with margin-top:auto, background #2b1810, top border 2px solid #b8922a
- Brutal Rule box placeholder on page 1
If the scaffold is missing or incomplete, output the complete correct HTML scaffold for this file so the user can paste it in.
